actionUnits.condition: Scene Level1.unity loaded. MonoBehaviour (guid: f7de224e5fee443418417f9f2bfa2998; class: Scoremanager) is active. Serialized config indicates: StarValue = 1, winAmount = 2, UI refs wired (ScoreText fileID 174987324, AmountUI fileID 395448813, Timer fileID 388437890), winlosescript wired (fileID 93502226). Start() should already have run (AmountUI.text == 'Star Amount: 2'). Manually trigger a single star collection by invoking Scoremanager.changescore(Scoremanager.StarValue) once. Expectation during trigger: internal 'score' increments to 1, ScoreText updates to 'Stars: 1', Timer continues updating via Update().

With current score at 1, invoke Scoremanager.changescore(Scoremanager.StarValue) a second time to reach the win condition (score == winAmount == 2). Expectation during trigger: ScoreText updates to 'Stars: 2'. After the increment, winlosescript.Winlevel() should be invoked by Scoremanager when score == winAmount.
